description: Master list of states with country relationships
Master list of districts with state relationships
Master list of schools with geographic hierarchy

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_SCHOOL_GOVERNANCE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_SCHOOL_GOVERNANCE (
	GOVERNANCE_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	SCHOOL_ID BIGINT,
	YEAR_ID INTEGER,
	CONSTITUTION_OF_SMC VARCHAR(50),
	SMC_AND_SDMC_SAME VARCHAR(50),
	SDMC_CONSTITUTED VARCHAR(50),
	FOREIGN KEY (SCHOOL_ID) REFERENCES DIM_SCHOOL (SCHOOL_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (YEAR_ID) REFERENCES DIM_YEAR (YEAR_ID)
);

description: Normalized enrollment data across all categories and grades
School inspection and official visit data
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_SCHOOL_MONITORING CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_SCHOOL_MONITORING (
	MONITORING_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	SCHOOL_ID BIGINT,
	YEAR_ID INTEGER,
	ACADEMIC_INSPECTIONS_IN_THE_PREVIOUS_ACADEMIC_YEAR INTEGER,
	VISITS_MADE_BY_CRC_COORDINATOR BIGINT,
	VISITS_MADE_BY_BLOCK_LEVEL_OFFICERS BIGINT,
	VISITS_MADE_BY_DISTRICT_OR_STATE_LEVEL_OFFICERS BIGINT,
	FOREIGN KEY (SCHOOL_ID) REFERENCES DIM_SCHOOL (SCHOOL_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (YEAR_ID) REFERENCES DIM_YEAR (YEAR_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_STUDENT_SUPPORT_PRIMARY CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_STUDENT_SUPPORT_PRIMARY (
	SUPPORT_PRIMARY_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	SCHOOL_ID BIGINT,
	YEAR_ID INTEGER,
	PRIMARY_GRADE_CHILDREN_WHO_RECEIVED_FREE_TEXTBOOKS BIGINT,
	PRIMARY_GRADE_CHILDREN_WHO_RECEIVED_FREE_TRANSPORT_FACILITY BIGINT,
	PRIMARY_GRADE_CHILDREN_WHO_RECEIVED_FREE_UNIFORMS BIGINT,
	FOREIGN KEY (SCHOOL_ID) REFERENCES DIM_SCHOOL (SCHOOL_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (YEAR_ID) REFERENCES DIM_YEAR (YEAR_ID)
);

description: Upper primary grade student support programs

CREATE TABLE FACT_STUDENT_SUPPORT_UPPER_PRIMARY (
